_publications._publicationTitle: p21-Activated kinases are required for transformation in a cell-based model of neurofibromatosis type 2.

_contextSnippet: the invasiveness of ΔBB cells was almost twice that of control NIH-3T3 cells. Assuming linear invasion kinetics, expression of PID, but not PID LF, significantly inhibited the invasive capacity
details: ΔBB cells showed almost twice the invasiveness of control NIH-3T3 cells, with PID significantly inhibiting invasive capacity
